endpoints.name: GET /apps/{appId}/permissions
endpoints.description: Gets the list of user emails that have permissions to access your application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid.

endpoints.name: POST /apps/{appId}/permissions
endpoints.description: Adds a user to the allowed list of users to access this LUIS application. Users are added using their email address.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid.

endpoints.name: PUT /apps/{appId}/permissions
endpoints.description: Replaces the current users access list with the one sent in the body. If an empty list is sent, all access to other users will be removed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /apps/{appId}/permissions
endpoints.description: Removes a user from the allowed list of users to access this LUIS application. Users are removed using their email address.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid.

endpoints.name: POST /apps/{appId}/publish
endpoints.description: Publishes a specific version of the application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /apps/{appId}/versions/{versionId}/phraselists/{phraselistId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a phraselist feature.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{VERSIONID}} with a real versionid. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid. Replace {{PHRASELISTID}} with a real phraselistid.

endpoints.name: GET /apps/{appId}/versions/{versionId}/prebuilts
endpoints.description: Gets information about the prebuilt entity models.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{VERSIONID}} with a real versionid. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid.

endpoints.name: POST /apps/{appId}/versions/{versionId}/prebuilts
endpoints.description: Adds a list of prebuilt entity extractors to the application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{VERSIONID}} with a real versionid. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid.

endpoints.name: GET /apps/{appId}/versions/{versionId}/prebuilts/{prebuiltId}
endpoints.description: Gets information about the prebuilt entity model.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{VERSIONID}} with a real versionid. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid. Replace {{PREBUILTID}} with a real prebuiltid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /apps/{appId}/versions/{versionId}/prebuilts/{prebuiltId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a prebuilt entity extractor from the application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{VERSIONID}} with a real versionid. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid. Replace {{PREBUILTID}} with a real prebuiltid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /apps/{appId}/versions/{versionId}/suggest
endpoints.description: Deleted an unlabelled utterance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{VERSIONID}} with a real versionid. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid.

endpoints.name: GET /apps/{appId}/versions/{versionId}/train
endpoints.description: Gets the training status of all models (intents and entities) for the specified LUIS app. You must call the train API to train the LUIS app before you call this API to get training status. "appID" specifies the LUIS app ID. "versionId" specifies the version number of the LUIS app. For example, "0.1".
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{VERSIONID}} with a real versionid. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid.

endpoints.name: POST /apps/{appId}/versions/{versionId}/train
endpoints.description: Sends a training request for a version of a specified LUIS app. This POST request initiates a request asynchronously. To determine whether the training request is successful, submit a GET request to get training status. Note: The application version is not fully trained unless all the models (intents and entities) are trained successfully or are up to date. To verify training success, get the training status at least once after training is complete.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{VERSIONID}} with a real versionid. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid.
